channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo monthly.

item.title: ☕ OtterMind/Nubase (459 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: OtterMind

📝 Repository: OtterMind/Nubase

📄 Descrizione: 🔥🔥🔥 Turn AI-written code into real apps. Nubase is an open-source, AI-native backend platform for AI Coding, agentic applications, and modern product teams: Memory, Database, Storage, and Auth in one self-hostable service.

⭐ Stelle: 459

🍴 Forks: 40

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: agent ai ai-agents claude-code cli deno memory openclaw opencode pgvector postgresql postgrest rag skill supabase supabase-auth

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-08T08:42:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-07T05:48:28Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ nullpointexception-i/agent-sphere (345 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nullpointexception-i

📝 Repository: nullpointexception-i/agent-sphere

📄 Descrizione: This project is an AI Agent orchestration platform. It uses an LLM-driven decision engine, combined with capabilities (built-in tools, MCP protocol, CLI execution, browser operations, etc.), to achieve a basic closed loop from perception → planning → execution → feedback.本项目是一个面向 AI Agent 编排平台。它通过 LLM 驱动的决策引擎，结合能力（内置工具、MCP 协议、CLI 执行、浏览器操作等）

⭐ Stelle: 345

🍴 Forks: 10

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: agent agentic-ai java llm reactjs

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-19T11:53:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-06T03:13:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ DerekYRC/mini-claude-code (93 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DerekYRC

📝 Repository: DerekYRC/mini-claude-code

📄 Descrizione: mini-claude-code: a simplified Java Claude Code agent distilling core Agent Harness mechanisms. Features: Agent Loop, tools, permission control, Hooks, Todo, Subagent, Skill Loading, context compression, memory, tasks, background tasks, scheduling, multi-agent collaboration, team protocol, autonomous claiming, MCP Plugin.

⭐ Stelle: 93

🍴 Forks: 14

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-13T06:09:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-07T02:39:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ icysymmetra/tiktok-patches-for-morphe (89 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: icysymmetra

📝 Repository: icysymmetra/tiktok-patches-for-morphe

📄 Descrizione: This repository is a Morphe patch source for TikTok. It continues the work from earlier community TikTok patch sets, including ReVanced, with the patches adapted for Morphe and tested against newer TikTok builds. The current target version is TikTok 43.8.3

⭐ Stelle: 89

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

👤 Owner: bigchuidw3

📝 Repository: bigchuidw3/spring-ai-agentx

📄 Descrizione: 基于原生 Spring AI 的智能体（Agent）开发框架，提供 ReAct 执行引擎、分层记忆、工具调度、Human-in-the-Loop 等核心能力，形成完整的 Harness Engineering 方案，帮助开发者快速构建 AI Agent，可以快速搭建 Java 版的 Claude Code。

👤 Owner: kuohsuanlo

📝 Repository: kuohsuanlo/LazyContainerAgent

📄 Descrizione: kkRepo is a Nexus-compatible, self-hosted artifact repository for Maven, npm, PyPI, Go, Helm, NuGet, Cargo/Rust, Docker/OCI,RubyGems, and Yum artifacts. It supports one-click migration from Nexus to kkRepo.

item.title: ☕ ch060619/online-shop-platform (32 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ch060619

📝 Repository: ch060619/online-shop-platform

📄 Descrizione: 一个前后端分离的在线商城示例项目。后端使用 Spring Boot、MyBatis Plus 和 SQLite/MySQL，前端使用 Vue 3、Vite、Element Plus 和 Axios，实现商品浏览、分页筛选、购物车、下单、订单查询与取消等核心购物流程。

⭐ Stelle: 32

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: MIT License
